# Captain Summary Template

```text
Ship:
Audit package:
Roles used:
Overall recommendation:

Urgent blockers:
- ...

Accepted task candidates:
- ...

Rejected task candidates:
- ...

Deferred ideas:
- ...

Taste/high-risk questions for captain:
- ...

Recommended next command:
- ...
```

Keep the first screen short enough to read on a phone.

Stage 9.5 adds `new-external-agent-workflow.ps1 -Mode CaptainSummary` to generate this file from comparison JSON.
